case_title: ELIOS SOLAR, INC. VS. CARRIE GARCIA

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF JAN-03-2017 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF ELIOS SOLAR, INC.
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 08/19/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-01-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-03-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, REPRESENTED BY MICHAEL FAKUKAKIS, OWNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00 SERVED NOV-04-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, CARRIE

REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS-CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 11-01-16. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
